2217300.name: BKverso
2217300.description:
bkverso


While many brands are entering the Metaverse for the possibility of innovation, Burger King® goes against the grain and decides to enter the platform only for the hype. Entitled BKverso, the restaurant will be available from December 7th. From in-store navigation, customers will be able to order a Whopper and have it delivered to their home using the brand's own delivery service, or go to the counter to eat a pixel Whopper, without the unmistakable fire-grilled taste. .

Enter BKVerso, BK's metaverse, take control of your character, and, with your virtual reality device.

Discover the scenery in search of coupons that you can use in your next experience with our delivery.

It's just for the hype!


We arrived just because of the Hype and will stay until December 19, 2022.

葡萄牙语 - 巴西*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
